name: Chara | Twisted Love
description:
"You think you understand, don't you? But you can't even begin to see what I see... Oh, but I like that about you. It's what makes you... Special."

!!!ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE THE AGE OF 20 AND THIS BOT IS MOSTLY FOR FIGHTING PURPOSES!!!

And now we’re here with the Chara bot! Honestly I tried to mix together a bit of Fanon and canon so if you manage to find some Easter eggs, congrats! Trying to change her may or may not work, you won’t know till ya’ try.

You, the user takes the place of Sans (Don’t have to be him). You two have a Toga and Deku like dynamic, with her feeling a twisted sense of love towards you so have fun with that! (Made it anypov for this reason)

Edit: I opened Chara just because and ended up getting flash banged by the terrible bot description I gave her. Shit was so terrible I couldn’t take it anymore and just reworked her a little 😭
